category_sources: source_facts.description says CineCLI browses, inspects, and launches movie torrents from the terminal.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name provides cinecli; official PyPI/GitHub project text styles it as CineCLI.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub project; its README is the official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies movie torrent browsing and launching from a terminal CLI.
